description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a rectangular footprint, featuring a flat, tiled roof and a symmetrical facade. The front of the house is defined by a covered porch supported by columns, with two palm trees and a paved driveway leading up to it. Large windows and glass doors line both floors, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. On one side of the house, there is a backyard area with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and an umbrella, suggesting a focus on outdoor leisure. The property is landscaped with several trees and includes a parking area with a car. The overall design is clean, geometric, and emphasizes open, airy spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a front porch, and a backyard pool, surrounded by landscaping and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch with columns, two palm trees, driveway, and a glimpse of the backyard pool area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, parked car, and the symmetrical window arrangement along the side facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, umbrella, and additional landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool area, umbrella, and the side landscaping with trees and palm trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a covered porch, columns, and steps leading up from the driveway
